Article Title: Here's how participants can prepare for Times Internet Delhi Half Marathon
Article Text:
The structured planners

The consistent casuals

The power of social accountability

Training with technology

Different paths, one finish line

Signing up for a race is often the moment fitness stops being an idea and becomes a commitment. The date sits on the calendar, the distance suddenly feels real, and preparation begins, sometimes carefully planned, sometimes spontaneous. While every runner’s journey is different, the way people prepare for their first race often falls into a few distinct patterns. From structured training plans to technology-driven routines, each approach reflects how individuals turn intention into action.With the Times Internet Delhi Half Marathon set to take place on March 29 at Major Dhyan Chand National Stadium in Delhi, many first-time runners across the city are discovering their own style of preparation.Some train with precision, others rely on simple consistency, while many find motivation through friends or digital tools. What they all share is the same starting point: the decision to show up on race day. Register now and secure your spot.For some runners, preparation begins with a detailed plan. These are the individuals who search for training schedules the moment they register. They map out weekly runs, track distances, and gradually increase their mileage in a disciplined progression.Structured planners often follow a clear routine: shorter runs during the week, longer endurance sessions on weekends, and rest days to allow recovery. They monitor their pace, adjust their nutrition, and pay attention to sleep patterns as race day approaches.For them, preparation is a process of steady improvement. Each completed run builds confidence, turning a once-intimidating distance into a manageable challenge. By the time race day arrives, they have already rehearsed the effort many times.Not everyone trains with spreadsheets and strict schedules. Many runners prepare through something far simpler: consistency.These individuals do not obsess over perfect pacing or complex training programs. Instead, they focus on one principle, showing up regularly. A few runs during the week, a slightly longer one on the weekend, and the routine slowly builds momentum.What begins as a casual commitment gradually evolves into real progress. Without overthinking the process, these runners develop endurance through repetition. The strength of this approach lies in its simplicity: small efforts repeated consistently often produce remarkable results.For many first-time participants, running alone is the hardest part. That is why social accountability has become one of the most powerful motivators in race preparation.Friends sign up together, colleagues form small running groups, and weekend meet-ups become training sessions. What might have been skipped on a tired morning becomes easier when someone else is waiting at the starting point.Running with others also turns preparation into a shared experience. Conversations during training runs replace the monotony of solo workouts, and progress becomes something people celebrate together. By race day, the group dynamic often matters just as much as the finish line itself. Register now and secure your spot.In recent years, technology has transformed the way people prepare for races. Fitness watches track pace and heart rate. Mobile apps record distance, analyse performance, and suggest training improvements. Online communities allow runners to compare progress, share achievements, and stay motivated.Technology-driven training offers instant feedback. A runner can see how far they have improved, how their pace has evolved, and how close they are to their target distance. For many beginners, these insights create a sense of measurable progress that keeps them engaged throughout the training process.What makes race preparation fascinating is that there is no single “correct” method. Some runners follow structured programs with discipline, while others simply run when they can. Some rely on friends for motivation, while others depend on data from digital tools.Yet all these approaches lead to the same destination: the starting line. At the Times Internet Delhi Half Marathon on March 29 at Major Dhyan Chand National Stadium, runners from across the city will come together, each carrying their own journey of preparation. By the time they gather on race morning, every training run, planned or spontaneous, will have contributed to the moment.However, not everyone who considered participating will be there. With registrations nearing capacity and the countdown already underway, the starting line is filling up fast-making this the final opportunity to be part of this year’s run. Missing it doesn’t just mean skipping a race; it means waiting an entire year for the same experience.The first race is rarely about perfect performance. It is about the experience of showing up, pushing personal limits, and discovering what the body and mind can achieve together.
Article Summary: The times internet delhi half marathon is set to take place on march 29 at major dhyan chand national stadium in delhi. With registrations nearing capacity and the countdown already underway, the starting line is filling up fast. Some train with precision, others rely on simple consistency, while many find motivation through friends or digital tools.

Article Title: Auston Matthews injury update changes everything in Toronto, as Leafs brace for long-term absence of franchise cornerstone
Article Text:
Auston Matthews undergoes surgery (Getty Images)

Auston Matthews injury leaves Craig Berube with urgent lineup questions and no margin for error



Auston Matthews injury has forced Toronto into a corner, and there is no time to ease into the reality of it. The news came quickly on Thursday. Surgery on his MCL in New York, a 12-week recovery, and suddenly the Maple Leafs are staring at the rest of their regular season without their captain. What once felt uncertain is now settled. Matthews is not coming back anytime soon, and Toronto’s margin for error has all but disappeared.Craig Berube had kept his cards close earlier in the day, but the clarity that followed only made the challenge sharper. Toronto sits on 70 points through 69 games, just outside the playoff picture. Every game now carries weight, and the room knows it. There is no waiting this out. The team has to respond immediately, or risk letting the season drift beyond reach.The absence of Matthews is not something you patch with a single move. It touches everything. He takes the toughest matchups, drives the top line, and gives the power play its edge. Without him, opponents can narrow their focus. The ice feels smaller when that kind of presence disappears.Berube now has to rethink his structure on the fly. John Tavares shifts into a heavier role down the middle, which means tougher defensive assignments and more time starting in his own zone.That is a demanding ask at this stage of the season, but there is little choice. The responsibility has to go somewhere.William Nylander’s role grows just as quickly. His ability to carry the puck through the neutral zone becomes central to how Toronto creates offense. Clean entries matter more now. There is less room for error, fewer second chances if a rush breaks down.The power play, too, needs a reset. Matthews gave Toronto a shooting threat that forced penalty killers to stretch. Without that option, the setup changes. Someone else has to become the trigger, and that adjustment rarely clicks overnight.The numbers already hint at trouble. A minus-25 goal differential tells a story of inconsistency, and losing an elite finisher does not help. If anything, it sharpens the pressure on a group that has struggled to keep games under control.Berube’s tone will matter as much as any tactical shift. Publicly, he has stayed calm. Inside the room, the message has to be sharper. This is the stretch that defines their season.There is no outside solution arriving tomorrow. It rests on the players already here. Adapt quickly, or fall behind. Because now the goal is simple, even if it is not easy. Stay close enough, long enough, to make Matthews’ return mean something.
Article Summary: Auston matthews injury leaves craig berube with urgent lineup questions. Toronto sit on 70 points through 69 games, just outside the playoff picture. Every game now carries weight, and the room knows it. There is no waiting this out. The team has to respond immediately, or risk letting the season drift beyond reach.

Article Title: What is Dell Curry’s net worth in 2026? Exploring career earnings and more as Charlotte Hornets retire his jersey
Article Text:
Dell Curry. Image via: Darren Yamashita-Imagn Images

What is Dell Curry's current net worth?



Dell Curry. Image via: Kyle Terada-USA TODAY Sports

Charlotte Hornets retires Dell Curry's jersey



Former Charlotte Hornets player Dell Curry speaks at halftime as his jersey is retired during an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Thursday, March 19, 2026, in Charlotte, N.C. (AP Photo/Matt Kelley)

For decades, NBA fans have seen Dell Curry as one of the most celebrated personalities in the Charlotte Hornets. Today, as the franchise raises his No. 30 jersey, the focus has turned to his legacy, earnings in his career, and his financial position in totality. The moment unites his impact on the field and a years-long relationship with the organization.Curry was a reliable scorer in the 1990s and later became a familiar voice in the broadcast booth. As the Hornets honor him, here’s what you need to know about the legend’s financial details and more.The net worth of Dell Curry in 2026 is estimated at $8 million (as per the last update on Celebrity Net Worth). He has established his financial worth with a consistent NBA career.He has participated in the league between the years 1986 and 2002, starting with Utah Jazz and proceeding to Cleveland Cavaliers, Hornets, Milwaukee Bucks and Toronto Raptors.Across those years, Curry earned roughly $19.8 million in salary, a figure that rises significantly when adjusted for inflation. His highest single-season salary came during the 1997-98 season with Charlotte. He carved out a role as a dependable scorer off the bench and won the NBA Sixth Man of the Year award in 1994.His financial path did not end with retirement. Curry transitioned into broadcasting and advisory roles, remaining closely tied to the Hornets. He also invested time in community initiatives, including a foundation focused on youth development in Charlotte.The Hornets’ decision to retire Curry’s No. 30 marks one of the most significant honors in franchise history. His reaction showed how unexpected the moment felt. “I thought it was a prank," Curry said during a phone interview. “The look I must have given him … he said, ‘No, I’m serious.’”That disbelief soon turned into reflection. “Not being that true superstar guy, when it was first announced, I wondered if I deserved this,” Curry said. Later, he added, “When I thought about it that way, I'm like, ‘Wow, maybe I do deserve this,’”Curry spent 10 seasons in Charlotte after being selected in the expansion draft, becoming the team’s all-time leading scorer with 9,839 points. His role extended into the modern era, where he continues to serve as a broadcaster and ambassador.His understanding of the evolving game remains sharp. “I always thought I should be shooting more. But it was not the way the game was played,” he said. “Back then we had dominant centers. You played inside-out basketball. Now it's played outside the 3-point line and in.”No. 30 will remain in the rafters for Curry.
Article Summary: The net worth of dell curry in 2026 is estimated at $8 million (as per the last update on celebrity net worth). He has established his financial worth with a consistent nba career. His highest single-season salary came during the 1997-98 season with charlotte. Curry transitioned into broadcasting and advisory roles, remaining closely tied to the hornets.

Article Title: 2026 MLB on ESPN: Full TV schedule with dates, teams and key games revealed
Article Text:
2026 MLB (Images Via Getty)

Full 2026 MLB on ESPN schedule with dates time and matchups

ESPN focuses on summer schedule as New York Yankees, Boston Red Sox and Los Angeles Dodgers headline key matchups

If you are planning to watch MLB games on TV this season, ESPN has made things a bit different for 2026. The network is not spreading games across the whole year like before. Instead, most of the big matchups are packed into the summer months. That means more action when the season really starts getting intense.April 15 at 10 p.m. ET: New York Mets vs Los Angeles Dodgers on ESPNMay 7 at 7 p.m. ET: Tampa Bay Rays vs Boston Red Sox on ESPNMay 7 at 10 p.m. ET: St. Louis Cardinals vs San Diego Padres on ESPNMay 25 at 3:30 p.m. ET: New York Yankees vs Kansas City Royals on ESPNJune 14 at 3 p.m. ET: Chicago Cubs vs San Francisco Giants on ABCJune 22 at 10 p.m. ET: Atlanta Braves vs San Diego Padres on ESPNJune 27 at 1 p.m. ET: New York Yankees vs Boston Red Sox on ABCJuly 16 at 7 p.m. ET: New York Mets vs Philadelphia Phillies on ESPNAugust 16 at 3 p.m. ET: St. Louis Cardinals vs Chicago Cubs on ABCAugust 23 at 7 p.m. ET: Atlanta Braves vs Milwaukee Brewers on ESPNMore games will be added and confirmed later as the season progresses.If you are planning to follow MLB on TV this season, ESPN has changed things a bit for 2026. The network is putting most of its big games in the middle of the season. Instead of spreading them out, the focus is now on June, July, and August.In total, ESPN will air 30 exclusive national games. Out of those, 23 are set during the summer months. This is when the season gets serious, and every game starts to matter more. So the idea is simple: more important games, more attention, and more excitement.The schedule still begins with some big early moments. On April 15, ESPN will show the Jackie Robinson Day game between the New York Mets and the Los Angeles Dodgers at 10 p.m. ET. Then, on May 7, fans get the first doubleheader. The Tampa Bay Rays face the Boston Red Sox at 7 p.m., followed by the St. Louis Cardinals vs San Diego Padres at 10 p.m.Later in May, the New York Yankees play the Kansas City Royals on Memorial Day at 3:30 p.m. ET. Moving into June, the Atlanta Braves take on the San Diego Padres on June 22. A few days later, on June 27, the New York Yankees face the Boston Red Sox in Boston, airing on ABC.July brings the second-half opener on July 16, where the New York Mets play the Philadelphia Phillies. August also has key games, including the St. Louis Cardinals vs Chicago Cubs on August 16 and the Little League Classic on August 23 between the Atlanta Braves and Milwaukee Brewers. Some games are still not fixed. ESPN will decide those matchups closer to the dates, depending on team form and standings.
Article Summary: Espn will air 30 exclusive national games in 2026. Out of those, 23 are set during the summer months. This is when the season gets serious, and every game starts to matter more. New york yankees, boston red sox and los angeles dodgers headline key matchups.

Article Title: Iga Swiatek: Iga Swiatek faces tough Miami Open build up after Indian Wells loss as practice issues and ranking slip spark concern
Article Text:
Iga Swiatek (Image Via Getty)

Iga Swiatek talks about difficult Miami Open preparation after Indian Wells loss to Elina Svitolina

Iga Swiatek is heading into the 2026 Miami Open, but things do not look fully smooth for her right now. Just days after her Indian Wells exit, the Polish star opened up about the challenges she is facing in Florida. From tough weather to limited court time, her preparation has not been easy.She has been training in Miami with her coach Tim Fissette, trying to adjust quickly. However, it has not been perfect. There were moments during practice where she looked frustrated, and even had a tense exchange with her team. Still, she managed to complete two practice sessions before the tournament begins.Speaking to the media, Iga Swiatek honestly explained what she has been dealing with.She said, “It’s been tricky with the practices because of the weather but we changed our schedule to manage that and yeah I got two practices now which is great also not so much flexibility with the courts because these are the busiest days of the tournament.”She also pointed out that adjusting to new conditions is not simple. “So I’ll try to adjust to the conditions because that’s the most important thing when you switch from different surfaces and everything and be ready for the first match.”Even though she felt good during parts of training, there are still some unknowns. “I felt great during practice, but obviously, it’s usually closed patterns there, it’s gonna also take some adjustments I would say, but the center court hasn’t been available. So also we are going to see how the surface looks on a center court.”Her current situation comes right after a tough loss at Indian Wells. Swiatek was knocked out in the quarterfinal by Elina Svitolina in a three-set match, 6-2, 4-6, 6-4. It was a close contest, but she could not finish strong.That result also affected her ranking. After the tournament, Elena Rybakina moved ahead of her. Swiatek is now ranked No. 3, behind Aryna Sabalenka and Rybakina. The gap between her and Rybakina stands at 370 points.Another concern is her form this season. So far in 2026, she has not won a title. In fact, she has not gone past the quarterfinal stage in any tournament this year. She lost to Rybakina at the Australian Open, then Maria Sakkari at the Qatar Open, and now Svitolina at Indian Wells.So as she enters the Miami Open, there are a few questions around her. She still remains one of the top players in the world, but she will need a strong performance to regain momentum.
Article Summary: Iga swiatek talks about difficult miami open preparation after indian wells loss. The polish star opened up about the challenges she is facing in florida. She has been training in miami with her coach tim fissette, trying to adjust quickly.

Article Title: Auston Matthews Injury Update: NHL injury update: Auston Matthews to undergo surgery for Grade 3 MCL injury recovery, possibly to appear next season on time
Article Text:
Auston Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad contusion on the knee-on-knee play with Radko Gudas (Image via Imagn Images)

NHL analyst predicts that Auston Matthews might undergo surgery after his brutal knee-on-knee hit

The Toronto Maple Leafs have received a crucial injury update on captain Auston Matthews following his collision with Radko Gudas, with possibilities of surgery based on the severity of the injury. The star player is currently facing a significant recovery process after suffering a serious knee injury following a brutal collision with Radko Gudas, raising concerns about his availability and long-term health.Radko Gudas’ knee-on-knee hit ended the Toronto Maple Leafs captain’s season and resulted in only a five-game suspension. Reports suggest Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad contusion following the collision.The team later confirmed that his medical recommendations indicate that he will not return to play in the final stretch of the calendar. Toronto Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews will probably undergo surgery as part of his recovery from his severe Grade 3 MCL injury sustained in a brutal collision with Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas during an NHL match. This was stated by NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman, who stated that surgery is likely part of the plan moving forward.Speaking on Matthews’ health update, Friedman stated, “We’ll see when it happens, but it sounds like surgery will be part of Auston Matthews’ recovery. There is still plenty of confidence he will start next season on time.” He is also of the opinion that, despite the severity of the injury, the player will appear next season on time.Earlier, following the incident, the NHL’s Department of Player Safety imposed a five-game suspension on the Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas. According to reports, he will forfeit $104,166.65 in salary during the suspension.Due to this misconduct and the NHL’s decision, several players, including the head coach of the Leafs, Craig Berube, have voiced their opinion on the five-game suspension imposed on Gudas. Berube shared his strong dissatisfaction with the NHL's five-game suspension handed to the Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas. He opposed the misconduct and called the hit a “dirty play.”The injury has sidelined Matthews, and the team has confirmed that, after his knee injury, he will not return to play in the final stretch of the calendar.Meanwhile, Matthews prolonged absence from the club has fueled speculation about the captain's future with Toronto, indicating trade moves. However, these are mere speculations, and no such trade decision has been confirmed so far by the club.
Article Summary: Nhl analyst predicts that auston matthews might undergo surgery after his brutal knee-on-knee hit with radko gudas. Reports suggest matthews suffered a grade 3 mcl tear and quad contusion following the collision. The team later confirmed that his medical recommendations indicate that he will not return to play in the final stretch of the calendar.

Article Title: Toronto Blue Jays: Connor Seabold suddenly enters Toronto Blue Jays plans as Yimi García injury chaos raises unexpected Opening Day bullpen twist
Article Text:
Connor Seabold (Image Via Getty)

Connor Seabold steps up as Yimi García injury leaves Toronto Blue Jays searching for bullpen solution

The Toronto Blue Jays are dealing with a problem just days before Opening Day. Their bullpen is not fully ready, and injuries have made things harder. But in the middle of all this, a new name is starting to stand out. Connor Seabold, who was not in the spotlight earlier, is now getting serious attention.The 30-year-old right-handed pitcher was signed in January for Triple-A Buffalo with a spring training invite. At that time, it looked like a simple depth move. Now, things have changed quickly. After strong performances in camp, Seabold is suddenly being seen as a real option for the main roster.Connor Seabold has impressed during spring training, and people around the team have noticed.In a Jays Digest video, Nick Gosse said, “I like seeing guys come up who aren’t really under-the-radar guys. He is a hidden gem.”Seabold’s numbers back that claim. His fastball speed has jumped from around 92 mph to nearly 96 mph, even touching 97. That is a big change. His whiff rate, which was under 22 percent last season, has now reached 46.8 percent in spring training. He also leads the Blue Jays camp with 13 strikeouts.What makes it more interesting is how he has improved his pitch mix. He added a new slider in the mid-80s, along with a strong changeup. Gosse explained, “He continued to develop himself, worked with Pete Walker, got his fastball ticked up, got a new slider, got some really good changeup.”His past record was not very strong. Last season, he split time between the Tampa Bay Rays and Atlanta Braves systems and had a 6.07 ERA in Triple-A. But his current form looks very different, and that is why the team is paying attention.At the same time, the Blue Jays are dealing with uncertainty around Yimi García. The 35-year-old reliever is coming back from right elbow surgery. He threw his first pitch of the season on March 14, but he is still not fully ready. The team has already confirmed he will not be part of the Opening Day roster.García said, “I feel good right now, I feel better than last season.” Still, the team is being careful with him. They are not rushing his return, especially because of his age and recent injury.There are more concerns as well. Pitchers like Ricky Tiedemann, Shane Bieber, and José Berríos are dealing with injuries. Bowden Francis is also out after surgery. With so many issues, the team needs someone reliable.That is where Seabold fits in. If he continues this form, he could play an important role early in the season. For now, he looks like a timely solution for a team that needs help.
Article Summary: Connor seabold has impressed during spring training for the toronto blue jays. The 30-year-old right-handed pitcher was signed in january for triple-a buffalo with a spring training invite. His fastball speed has jumped from around 92 mph to nearly 96 mph, even touching 97.

Article Title: Joe Burrow: Did Tom Brady warn Joe Burrow to stay away from Alix Earle after they were spotted together?
Article Text:
(Image via Getty Images)

Tom Brady humiliates Joe Burrow with savage “Wildcat” jab after Alix Earle drama



“I know what you did last Sunday,”

"That's what they called Joe the other night at those Oscars parties ..

the Wildcat, At least he's here, no fashion shows to attend to."

This is the "Battle of the Quarterbacks" nobody saw coming, and honestly? The scriptwriters for the 2026 NFL offseason deserve an Emmy. We’ve got the GOAT, the Golden Boy, and the Internet’s favorite "Hot Mess" all tangled up in a web of Oscars after-parties and flag football shade.If you haven’t been refreshing your feed, here is the absolute tea on why Tom Brady and Joe Burrow are currently the pettiest rivals in sports.It all started on Sunday night at the Vanity Fair Oscars party. Joe Burrow, fresh off his breakup with long-time girlfriend Olivia Holzmacher and clearly enjoying his "Single Joe" era was spotted leaving the bash in a black SUV. The passenger list? Pop star Tate McRae and, most importantly, Alix Earle.Now, normally, Joe grabbing a ride with an influencer wouldn't be a national emergency. But Alix Earle has been the rumored "discreet" companion of one Tom Brady since Super Bowl weekend. They’ve been spotted everywhere from Miami to San Francisco, and while they haven't gone "Instagram official," the veteran QB has reportedly been very protective of their "situationship."Fast forward to Wednesday night at the Fanatics Flag Football Draft.Brady and Burrow were on stage together, and the tension was thick enough to cut with a championship ring. When it was time to talk strategy, Brady didn’t just talk shop, he went for the jugular.With a smirk that screamedBrady leaned into the mic and referred to Burrow as "The Wildcat." It seemed like a nod to Joe’s flag football team name, but Brady followed it up with a pointed jab:The crowd went silent. Burrow’s reaction? A stone-cold side-eye that has already been turned into a thousand memes. Brady is the 48-year-old legend trying to maintain his "cool" status. Burrow is the 29-year-old heartthrob who is currently the most eligible bachelor in the league. Brady famously hates his private life being a spectacle. By getting into a car with Alix Earle in front of a wall of paparazzi, Burrow basically blew up Brady’s spot.They are literally facing off this Saturday, March 21, in the Flag Football Classic. Brady is captaining "Team Founders," and Burrow is leading "Team Wildcats."Whether Joe was actually "scouting" Alix or just hitching a ride, Brady clearly took it as a personal foul. We’re looking at a classic case of the veteran marking his turf against the young gun.
Article Summary: Tom brady humiliated joe burrow with savage “wildcat” jab after alix earle drama. Brady is captaining "team founders," and burrow is leading "team wildcats" burrow's reaction? A stone-cold side-eye that has already been turned into a thousand memes.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes: Kansas City Chiefs acquire Justin Fields while Patrick Mahomes enjoys offseason vacay time with wife Brittany Mahomes and kids
Article Text:
Kansas City Chiefs acquire Justin Fields while Patrick Mahomes enjoys offseason vacay time with wife Brittany Mahomes and kids (Image via Instagram: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes)

Chiefs QB Patrick Mahomes is known for defying odds but Justin Fields may start 2026 season

Brittany Mahomes ’ recent vacation spot could be The Bahamas



Patrick Mahomes and wife Brittany pose like Chiefs heiress Gracie Hunt and Derek Green

Maybe Kansas City Chiefs long-time and Super Bowl-winning quarterback Patrick Mahomes knows that Justin Fields would not replace him. Maybe for Week 1 of the 2026 season, but not otherwise.So, three days after his franchise signed a new signal caller, his wife, Brittany, posted several pictures from their offseason vacation on Instagram . Those pictures even showed Mahomes’ injured knee plastered in a black cast, signaling everyone that he’ll soon be back on the gridiron.More hopes? The last picture by the sea showed him without a cast! So maybe he will return for Week 1! And Fields would become his backup. All speculation.It’s Mahomes’ goal after all, to return for the first game of the new season. Head coach Andy Reid told reporters in Feb. that the signal-caller was spending seven hours a day in the training facility. His recovery timeline puts him on the gridiron by mid-September. But he is known for defying the odds.Even Chiefs owner Clark Hunt believes so.“I wouldn’t put it past him,” Hunt said via Good Morning Football. “He’s somebody in the past who has healed very quickly, and again, his work ethic, I think, gives him a huge advantage in getting back and being ready to play in 2026.”The Chiefs may not have wanted to pressure their star player, so as insurance, they traded for Fields from New York in exchange for a 2027 sixth-round pick.ESPN’s Adam Schefter reports Fields may get ample reps during the offseason and training camp and may potentially play early on in the season, depending on Mahomes’ recovery timeline.The three-time Super Bowl champion is working hard on his recovery, but for now, quality time with his beautiful family is on his mind. Their latest vacation snapshots show they’re taking it one day at a time and truly trying to recover by spending quality time on the beach side. Beach is known for soothing souls.One of the pictures has Brittany with her three little babies standing before a huge bronze statue of a charging bull. It could be a replica of the famous “Charging Bull” near Wall Street.There was also a white building behind the bull, it may be The Honeycomb. They may have gone to the Albany Resort in The Bahamas.While most pictures featured the three little angels, some showed the NFL power couple. Two of them looked just like Gracie Hunt and Derek Green’s photos.When Gracie revealed her mystery man last summer, she shared pictures from their tropical getaways. One of them had Gracie and her boyfriend, Derek, by the turquoise pool. Brittany also posted similar pictures with Patrick by the turquoise pool.But the only difference between the two? Gracie’s photo depicted nighttime on the rocky floor. Brittany’s photo was taken during the daytime and on a tiled floor. Now, a probable common depiction? Their love is as deep and vast as the sea…
Article Summary: Kansas city chiefs acquire justin fields while patrick mahomes enjoys offseason vacay time with wife brittany mahomes and kids. One of the pictures has brittany with her three little babies standing before a huge bronze statue of a charging bull. The last picture by the sea showed him without a cast!

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Minnesota Vikings chosen for $50M Atlanta Falcons safety
Article Text:
(Image via Getty: Minnesota Vikings logo and Atlanta Falcons logo)

Falcons safety Jessie Bates III projected as trade option for Vikings

Atlanta safety traded to Minnesota as veteran presence for Dillon Thieneman

Atlanta S Jessie Bates III stats and contract projection



FanSided’s Wynston Wilcox reports that Atlanta Falcons safety Jessie Bates III, who is in the final year of his contract, could be a trade option for the Minnesota Vikings.He carries a 2026 cap hit of $13M. Minnesota recently signed Arizona Cardinals quarterback Kyler Murray on a veteran minimum contract, which leaves them with enough cap space to accommodate an upgrade in the secondary. But Wilcox calls Bates expensive.Spotrac’s calculated market value projects the 29-year-old safety to a three-year contract worth $50M, which gives him an average annual income of $16M. The Wake Forest alum could be worth it, considering the Vikings feel they’re a quarterback away from being Super Bowl contenders.Bates did not flourish much in Atlanta after leaving Cincinnati in 2022. And he hasn’t been impactful in the Falcons, either.Now, because of the cap hit he carries this year, Wilcox doubts if he’ll ever be back to an impactful performance. However, there’s a solution for him and his new team, the Vikings.Wilcox calls it a gamble, but it would be worth trying given the win-win scenario it offers. So, Minnesota can trade for Bates from Atlanta and also draft Harrison Smith ’s successor. This would create a lethal safety duo for the Vikings, and Bates would end up with a team that is more of a Super Bowl contender than his previous franchise.The Vikings need a successor for their longtime veteran safety Harrison Smith. Smith was released this offseason. They are already in talks of acquiring Oregon Ducks safety Dillon Thieneman as their 18th overall pick.But to acclimatize the rookie, they may need a veteran presence. And that veteran could be Bates [just speculation]. Anyhow, it doesn’t look like the Falcons are ready to give up on him just yet.Falcons Wire’s Matt Urben reports Atlanta has not made any changes at safety, and starters Jessie Bates III and Xavier Watts will be back in 2026.The Athletic’s Josh Kendall also reports the Falcons are set at safety with Bates and Watts in the starting roles, although the veteran is entering the final year of his contract.NFL Network’s Scott Smith calls Bates the Iron Man at safety. He has not missed a single game since he joined Atlanta in 2023. In his eight-year career, he only sat out three. He recorded 3,320 defensive snaps in 51 regular-season games.He has accumulated 810 total tackles [534 solo], 1.0 sack, 11 forced fumbles, three fumble recoveries, 27 interceptions, and 70 passes defended in 130 games played in five seasons for the Bengals and three for the Falcons.According to Spotrac, Bates is projected to sign a three-year contract worth $50M, which gives him an average annual salary of $16.7M. His total career earnings over eight years are $70M.Would he be a trade option for the Vikings, especially with Harrison Smith’s farewell and Dillon Thieneman as rookie? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Atlanta falcons safety jessie bates iii could be a trade option for the minnesota vikings. The vikings need a successor for their longtime veteran safety harrison smith. Minnesota recently signed arizona cardinals quarterback kyler murray on a veteran minimum contract, which leaves them with enough cap space to accommodate an upgrade in the secondary.

Article Title: Madrid E-Prix 2026 schedule: Preview, where to watch, Formula E race timings, weather forecast
Article Text:
Madrid E-Prix (Image credit: Formula E)

Madrid E-Prix 2026 schedule



Where to watch the Madrid E-Prix 2026



Madrid E-Prix weather forecast



Madrid E-Prix preview



Formula E is finally back in action with Round 6 in Spain. The maiden Madrid E-Prix will mark the return of Formula E to Spanish soil at the historic Circuito del Jarama. As it is a new addition to the Formula E calendar, surprises could be on the cards, both on and off the podium. There have been five different race winners in the first five races this season, and another new name could well join the list. Here is everything you need to know about race timings, how and where to watch, the weather forecast and more.The maiden Madrid E-Prix weekend begins on Friday, 20 March, with a free practice. FP1 is scheduled to start at 4:30 pm local time (9:00 pm IST) and will last under an hour.Saturday, 21 March features a packed schedule. Free Practice 2 will take place in the morning at 8:30 am local time (1:00 pm IST).Qualifying for Round 6 is set for 10:40 am local time (3:10 pm IST). The Madrid E-Prix race will begin in the early evening at 3:05 pm local time (7:35 pm IST).The Madrid E-Prix weekend will conclude with a rookie test on Sunday, 22 March, where selected young drivers will take to the track at the Jarama circuit.Fans can follow live updates from the Madrid E-Prix via the official Formula E Race Centre on the website or app. Those looking to watch qualifying and the race live on television can tune in via the following broadcasters:India – Sony Sports NetworkSpain – DMAX, Discovery+, HBO Max, MARCA, RTVE Play, Teledeporte, Eurosport 2Europe – EurosportItaly – MediasetFrance and Monaco – L’ÉquipeUSA – Roku, CBS Sports NetworkUK – ITV, TNT SportsIndonesia – MNC TVJapan – J Sports, BS Fuji TVAustralia – Stan SportChina – Huya, Sina, Bilibili, CCTVCanada – TSN, TVA SportsSouth Africa – e.tvBrazil – Band TV, Grande PrêmioSouth America – Claro SportsNew Zealand – Sky TVAccording to AccuWeather, temperatures in Madrid on Friday, 20 March are expected to range between 8°C and 14°C, with heavy cloud cover and a chance of light drizzle.Rain is unlikely to affect race day, with conditions expected to be pleasant. Temperatures should be around 9°C during FP2 on Saturday morning, rising to approximately 12°C by midday, before dropping back to around 8°C during the race.Pascal Wehrlein currently leads the Formula E Drivers’ Championship with 68 points, with Mahindra Racing close behind on 62 points in the Teams’ standings.The 2026 season has already produced five different race winners. Jake Dennis claimed victory in Sao Paulo, while Nick Cassidy triumphed in Mexico City. Mitch Evans secured the win in Miami. Wehrlein won the opening race of the Jeddah double-header, with Antonio Felix da Costa taking victory in the second.As Formula E heads to a brand-new venue, all eyes will be on who emerges victorious at Jarama in Round 6.Also read: Madrid E-Prix: Antonio Felix Da Costa, Pepe Marti share excitement for maiden Spanish Formula E race
Article Summary: Formula e returns to spain with round 6 at the circuito del jarama. The maiden madrid e-prix will mark the return of formula e to spanish soil. There have been five different race winners in the first five races of the 2026 season.

Article Title: Madrid E-Prix: Circuito del Jarama set to host maiden Formula E race, here’s what makes it special
Article Text:
Madrid E-Prix (Image credit: Formula E)

All about the Madrid E-Prix circuit



Fans like the new Formula E circuit



The Madrid E-Prix returns to Spain this weekend, with Round 6 scheduled at the Circuito del Jarama. The 3.934 km circuit features 14 turns and was designed by John Hugenholtz, the mind behind iconic tracks such as Suzuka Circuit. It also carries significant historical importance. Here’s everything you need to know about the venue hosting the latest Formula E race on Saturday.Formula E first arrived at the venue at short notice in Season 11, when pre-season testing was held here in 2024 after flooding disrupted plans in Valencia.Spain last hosted a Formula E race during the 2020–21 season, when the GEN3 Evo cars ran at Circuit Ricardo Tormo.Nyck de Vries won the opening race, while Jake Dennis claimed his maiden Formula E victory in the double-header.The Jarama circuit is located in San Sebastián de los Reyes, around 32 kilometres from Madrid. It previously hosted the Spanish Grand Prix nine times between 1968 and 1981 and was also a regular venue for the Spanish Motorcycle Grand Prix, staging the event on 15 occasions.Formula E shared a video of the circuit on Instagram with the caption: “Vamos, Madrid! We’re ready to see the drivers hit the track for the first Formula E race near the Spanish capital!” Turn 1’s tight hairpin is expected to be a key overtaking spot, while Attack Mode is positioned later in the lap at Turn 7, at the top of the hill.Fans have also expressed excitement about the new venue. Reacting to the video, one fan wrote, “Is this the longest circuit Formula E have used?” Another commented, “Great to see Jarama back on the international racing scene, should also be a great fit for FE.” A third added, “Hoping this circuit stays for Gen 4. Those cars would be incredible there. Might even be able to ditch the chicane.” Another fan wrote, “What a beautiful circuit. It should remain on the calendar for years to come.”The maiden Madrid E-Prix weekend begins on 20 March with the first free practice session. Free Practice 2, qualifying for Round 6 and the race itself will take place on 21 March. Rain is unlikely to affect the running, with pleasant weather conditions expected throughout.Also read: Madrid E-Prix 2026 schedule: Preview, where to watch, Formula E race timings, weather forecast
Article Summary: The madrid e-prix returns to spain this weekend, with round 6 scheduled at the circuito del jarama. The 3.934 km circuit features 14 turns and was designed by john hugenholtz, the mind behind iconic tracks such as suzuka circuit. The jarama circuit is located in san sebastián de los reyes, around 32 kilometres from madrid.

Article Title: “I realised she wasn’t coming back”: Megan Thee Stallion shares the heartbreaking moment she lost her mother amid her relationship with Klay Thompson
Article Text:
Megan Thee Stallion shares the heartbreaking moment she lost her mother amid her relationship with Klay Thompson.(Image via Getty Images)

Megan Thee Stallion opens up about losing her mother amid her romance with Klay Thompson



Klay Thompson brought a lot of happiness in Megan Thee Stallion’s life



Megan Thee Stallion, the six time Grammy winner, and Klay Thompson have turned heads with their high profile romance.While the popular rapper has denied rumors of a potential engagement happening soon, fans are still rooting for their future. Amid all this, Megan Thee Stallion’s heartbreaking statement about losing her mother has resurfaced.A few years ago, in 2019, the “Something for the Hotties” artist ended up losing her mother to brain tumor after a pretty long battle with the illness.In a heartbreaking interview, Megan Thee Stallion had opened up about her death as she said, “Once I realized she wasn’t coming back, I was just like, damn, I can’t keep her like this…”The six time Grammy winner added, “Because I knew she wouldn’t have wanted to stay like this…”Megan Thee Stallion continued, “So I had to make the decision to I guess pull the plug, and she just passed the next day.”Losing her mother was one of the biggest heartbreaks Megan Thee Stallion went through after her father passed away during her teenage years.Despite the pain and heartbreak, Megan Thee Stallion collected herself and has been pretty vocal about how she went back on stage just two weeks after losing her mother.Over the last few years, Megan Thee Stallion has been through a lot in her personal life, including a messy lawsuit with Tory Lanez over shooting her.Coupled with a few toxic relationships, many fans were concerned about Megan Thee Stallion’s mental health since she has always been vocal about her struggle with depression and anxiety.Fortunately, things changed in Megan Thee Stallion’s life when she fell deeply in love with the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson.The two went public with their relationship in July 2025 and seem pretty happy and content in their high profile relationship.Ever since the two have gone public, Megan Thee Stallion has also been pretty vocal about how she has found one of the “nicest men” ever and how she is in a much better place in her life.The NBA legend, Klay Thompson, has also defended his girlfriend in public as fans and peers trolled her for her previous relationships.Though there are rumors of an engagement happening soon, Megan Thee Stallion has slammed such rumors.
Article Summary: Megan thee stallion opens up about losing her mother amid her romance with klay thompson. The six time grammy winner lost her mother to brain tumor a few years ago. The two went public with their relationship in july 2025 and seem pretty happy and content.

Article Title: BGMI 4.3 update: Krafton collaborates with CSK and KKR for IPL 2026; check team-themed skins, vehicles, and first-ever photo booths
Article Text:
Source: Krafton BGMI

BGMI collaborates with CSK and KKR for new interactive in-game features



CSK on 21 March 2026

KKR on 25 March 2026

BGMI 4.3 adds CSK and KKR team-themed content for in-game fan engagement



BGMI and CSK collaboration (21 March 2026)



BGMI and KKR collaboration (25 March 2026)



BGMI 4.3 update: Other key features



Jujutsu Kaisen collaboration – Mini RP and Lucky Spin events based on the popular anime series worldwide.

Apollo Sportscar collaboration – Speed Drift addition for BGMI players to experience high-performance racing thrills in-game.

Phoenixtra X-Suit – Another high-end addition to BGMI’s exclusive elite-tier cosmetics.

Dark Raven X-Suit – Another fan favourite from the community, ideal for collectors and long-time players.

Ancient secret rise theme mode – One of the most cherished themed game experiences in BGMI, offering unique locations and combat for community and creator engagement.

How to download the BGMI 4.3 update



Step 1: Search ‘Bgminewupdate.com.in’ online.

Step 2: Open the website and look for the BGMI download page.

Step 3: Download both the APK and OBB files.

Step 4: Enable the “Unknown sources” option in your device settings to allow installation from external sources.

Step 5: Check the downloaded APK file on your device and start the installation process.

Step 6: After installation, move the OBB file to the following directory: Android > OBB > com.pubg.imobile.

Step 7: If the “com.pubg.imobile” folder is not present, create it manually and place the OBB file within it.

Step 8: Open the application, log in, and proceed to play the game.

In‑game content activation



CSK content becomes available starting March 21, 2026.

KKR content becomes available starting March 25, 2026.

Open the game, and check the Event or Store section to claim themed outfits, vehicle skins, and access Photo Booth POIs.

The BGMI 4.3 update is set to introduce dedicated content tied to the Indian Premier League 2026 season. According to BGMI maker Krafton, Chennai Super Kings‑themed items and Kolkata Knight Riders content are scheduled to go live in the game on March 21 and March 25, respectively. Krafton India has partnered with two of the IPL’s most prominent franchises to deliver branded collectables, vehicle skins, outfits, and new interactive in‑game elements. These additions extend beyond cosmetic changes and are designed to offer fans an immersive way to engage with their preferred teams within the BGMI environment.The release schedule and pattern of the BGMI 4.3 update imply a strategic attempt to incorporate sports franchise brand identities into a mobile gaming environment. By releasing team-themed material on specific datesThis update is in line with the IPL schedule and positions BGMI as a competitive environment and a space for fan engagement.This integration of franchise brand identities includes a variety of new interactive features such as branded collectables and Photo Booth POIs, in addition to retaining the fundamental battle royale game mechanics.For supporters of Chennai Super Kings (CSK), the battleground will receive its initial themed content on 21 March 2026. According to Krafton, the update includes two team‑branded items: the Thala Legacy Set outfit and the Thala Monster Truck vehicle skin.These items carry visual design cues tied directly to CSK’s identity and are available to players across BGMI’s core maps.Introduced alongside these cosmetic features are the first‑ever Photo Booth Points of Interest (POIs) in BGMI. These POIs appear at specific locations on the Erangel and Livik maps. When players approach a Photo Booth POI, they can view and capture in‑game photographs that include virtual representations of CSK players.Seddharth Merrotra, Head of Business Development at KRAFTON India, commented on the CSK collaboration, noting that the intention was to merge CSK’s fan passion with BGMI’s active player base in a way that feels meaningful. KS Viswanathan, Managing Director of CSK, described the update as a new method for supporters to celebrate their team through digital engagement rather than conventional broadcast or stadium‑centric experiences.From 25 March 2026, Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR)‑themed content becomes available within BGMI. The KKR rollout includes the Knight Dominion Set outfit and the Eden Charge Buggy vehicle skin. Similar to the CSK content, these items reflect KKR’s visual motifs and are usable across standard gameplay modes.KKR also receives dedicated Photo Booth POIs for Erangel and Livik. These POIs function identically to the CSK versions, enabling players to take in‑game photos that incorporate static virtual imagery associated with the KKR franchise. The presence of these points is intended to provide fans with additional avenues for team expression within the game’s interactive world.Binda Dey, Chief Marketing Officer at Knight Riders Sports, stated that this collaboration aims to extend the connection fans have with the KKR brand into a digital format.The 4.3 update is released through official platforms only:
Article Summary: Bgmi 4.3 adds csk and kkr team-themed content for in-game fan engagement. Krafton india has partnered with two of the ipl’s most prominent franchises to deliver branded collectables, vehicle skins, outfits and new interactive in‑game elements. From 25 march 2026, kolkata knight riders (kkr)‑themed content becomes available within bgmi.

Article Title: Bhubaneswar to host World Indoor Athletics; India only 4th Asian host
Article Text:
Indoor athletics centre at Kalinga Stadium

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

The 2017 Asian Athletics Championships at Kalinga Stadium saw the emergence of a 19-year-old Neeraj Chopra — then a junior world No. 1 — on the senior continental scene as he clinched the gold medal and a meet record in front of the packed crowd at the venue.After 11 years of that defining moment, Bhubaneswar is set to host the World Indoor Athletics Championships, in a first not just for Odisha but also the country.On Thursday, during the World Athletics Council meeting in Torun, Poland, which is the venue for the 2026 edition of the World Athletics Indoor Championships, India was chosen as the host of the multi-sports event that headlines the likes of Armand Duplantis and Keely Hodgkinson, two years from now.“India will host the 2028 World Athletics Indoor Championships in Bhubaneswar,” AFI president Bahadur Singh Sagoo said in a statement. “The global competition will be held at Kalinga’s Indoor Stadium.” The selection of an Indian venue — after a process that had the Kalinga Stadium Sports Complex indoor facility inspected by a two-member World Athletics team in Jan and given the subsequent clearance — vindicates India’s aspiration to host the 2036 Olympics.It is also a testament to Bhubaneswar becoming the sporting destination for track and field athletics in India.Apart from the 2017 continental event, the Kalinga Stadium has also hosted the World Athletics Continental Tour Bronze Level Competition last year, which attracted more than 200 athletes from different parts of the globe. It will also be hosting the inaugural National Indoors Athletics Championships next week. The two-day national event could be the warmup for the worlds event in two years. Organised by World Athletics, the World Indoor Athletics Championships is a biennial track and field competition that first took place in 1985 in Paris.India will become only the fourth Asian nation to host the championships, with the one in Bhubaneswar being the 22nd edition of the meet.However, the 21st edition of the event, set to kick off in Poland’s Torun on Friday, will not see any Indian athlete in action. But with the next edition now taking place at home, the crowd at Kalinga would once again hope for a rising Indian star, like Chopra did nine years back.
Article Summary: Bhubaneswar will host the world indoor athletics championships in 2028. India will become only the fourth asian nation to host the championships. The 21st edition of the event, set to kick off in poland’s torun on friday, will not see any indian athlete in action.

Article Title: Shattering records and cultivating future stars
Article Text:
Mayura Shanbaug

Ashish Kumar Srivastava - MD and CEO of PNB MetLife

Sameer Bansal - Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife

Chirag Shetty - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Satwiksairaj Rankireddy - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Disclaimer: Content Produced by PNB Metlife

The 7th PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide, earning global recognition and fostering a culture of resilience and determination in aspiring badminton starsIn a spectacular display of badminton prowess and youthful enthusiasm, the 7th edition of the PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship (JBC) etched its name in the annals of sporting history. Celebrating a staggering participation of 8257 young champions from across India, the championship not only broke its own record set in 2022 but also clinched the title of the ‘Most kids participating in a Badminton Championship in multiple cities’ as recognised by the World Record Certification Agency (WRCA).The grand finale unfolded at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton. The event, graced by chief guests Chirag Shetty and Satwik Rankireddy, Asian Games Gold Medalists and JBC 2023 mentors, was a true celebration of the sport’s rising stars.The 10-city extravaganza, spanning the length and breadth of the country, showcased the unwavering commitment of PNB MetLife in nurturing young talents in the badminton arena. With participants exceeding 8200, it’s evident that the PNB MetLife JBC has become a beacon for aspiring shuttlers, highlighting the deep-seated passion for badminton among the diverse and talented youth of India.Beyond the glitz and glamour of the record-breaking numbers, the championship holds a special place in the hearts of those at the helm. Ashish Kumar Srivastava, MD and CEO of PNB MetLife, expressed pride in not just surpassing their own world record but also in contributing to India’s glory on the international badminton stage. The championship, he emphasized, is not merely a competition but a significant milestone in creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem.This edition of the JBC saw a strategic partnership with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, who served as mentors for the young talents. Sameer Bansal, Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife, acknowledged the pivotal role played by these champions in inspiring the next generation of badminton stars. The focus, according to Bansal, is on unleashing the latent potential of young shuttlers and preparing them for global excellence.The Delhi chapter of the championship witnessed some nail-biting action with over 1000 participants competing fiercely across various categories. From Ananya Talyan’s stellar performance in Girls Singles Under 9 to Divyansh Rawat’s triumph in Boys Singles Under 17, the young talents left no shuttle unturned in their quest for victory.The results from the Delhi leg not only showcased the raw talent but also highlighted the championship’s commitment to breaking barriers. The PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship is not just about records; it’s about fostering a culture of healthy living, determination, and resilience among the future champions of the sport.In the words of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, the championship serves as an invaluable platform.---------------------------------------------------------------As we celebrate the successful culmination of the 7th edition of PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship , we take pride in surpassing our own world record for highest participation and for being recognized by World Record Certification Agency. Beyond the records, JBC represents a significant milestone in our mission to lay the groundwork for India’ s glory and success on the international badminton stage by creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem that nurtures champions at the grassroots levelThis year has been especially remarkable for PNB MetLife JBC as we joined hands with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy as JBC Mentors for the young talents associated with this tournament. They have played a pivotal role in inspiring young shuttlers to dream big and elevate their game and skills. We are eager for the next edition to unfold in our journey of unveiling the latent badminton potential across our nation and preparing them for global excellenceIt’s inspiring to witness the boundless talent and enthusiasm within our young athletes. My journey as JBC mentor has been incredibly fulfilling, as I got the opportunity to guide these budding champions and witness the journey of these young badminton stars. This championship is more than a competition; it is a platform that nurtures dreams, ignites aspirations, and, I believe, it is laying the foundation for future gold medalists in the makingTournaments like these serve as an invaluable platform for nurturing and harnessing the potential of our country’s young badminton stars. Witnessing the enthusiasm, passion, and skill displayed by these emerging shuttlers reinforces the belief that our country has an immense reservoir of talent. My association as a JBC mentor has been a source of immense pride, particularly given the role that the championship is playing in creating an incredible platform that is serving as a powerful catalyst, empowering young players and bolstering their confidence to become future champions
Article Summary: The 7th pnb metlife junior badminton championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide. The grand finale unfolded at the indira gandhi indoor stadium in new delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton.

Article Title: IPL Tickets Online: How to book IPL 2026 tickets online and offline, full IPL match schedule and other details
Article Text:
IPL 2026

IPL 2026 opening match



IPL 2026: Phase 1 schedule and double headers



Bengaluru

Mumbai

The phase will feature four double-headers, with afternoon matches starting at 3:30 PM IST and evening matches beginning at 7:30 PM IST. The first double-header of IPL 2026 takes place on April 4, when Delhi Capitals host Mumbai Indians at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi in the afternoon It will be followed by Gujarat Titans vs Rajasthan Royals at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad in the evening.

IPL 2026 home venues: Who is playing where



Royal Challengers Bengaluru will play five home matches in Bengaluru and two in Raipur.

Punjab Kings (PBKS) will host four matches at the PCA Stadium in New Chandigarh and three in Dharamshala.

Rajasthan Royals will begin their home campaign in Guwahati, where they will host Chennai Super Kings and Mumbai Indians. They will play four matches in Jaipur.

How to book IPL 2026 tickets online



Visit BookMyShow (bookmyshow.com), the District app (by Zomato), or your team's official website.

Search for the IPL 2026 match you want to attend using the date or team name.

Select your preferred seating category.

Choose your specific seats using the interactive stadium map.

Add the tickets to your cart and proceed to checkout.

Complete payment using a credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, or digital wallet.

The ticket will be sent to your registered email address or mobile number.

How to buy IPL 2026 tickets offline



Visit the nearest authorised ticket counter at the stadium or a designated retail outlet. Locations are typically announced on the team’s official website and social media closer to the match.

Check availability for your preferred match and seating category at the counter.

Carry a valid photo ID — an Aadhaar card, PAN card, or passport will be accepted.

Choose your seats and confirm your selection with the ticketing staff.

Make your payment — cash, card, and digital wallets are generally accepted at most venues.

Collect your ticket on the spot after the transaction is complete.
